results.title: Why Trump is sticking to his tariff guns
results.description: In case you haven’t heard, the Supreme Court just ruled many of Donald Trump’s tariffs illegal: [T]he Supreme Court ruled that the unilaterally imposed [tariffs] were illegal...No longer does Trump have a tariff “on/off” switch...Future tariffs will need to be imposed by lengthy, more technical trade authorities — or through Congress... In a 6-3 ruling, the Supreme [...]The post Why Trump is sticking to his tariff guns appeared first on Asia Times.
